title: The Iron Giant Moves Again
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Emeth, Unknown person #14, Atlas, Unknown person #15, Jinbe as The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But there are those who cannot be stopped!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's ready to fire!! What's gonna come out?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems the LAST 900 years have rendered those weapons inoperable!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Peter!! Crush them where they stand!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: End this transmission, once and for all!!

dialogue.speaker: Atlas
dialogue.text: I will not let you escape!!!

summary: This part advances the Escape from Egghead through 18 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
